# Banking Requirements Checklist: Store Banking Information

**Purpose**: Validate quality and completeness of UC-11 banking-information requirements before implementation.
**Created**: 2026-03-14
**Feature**: [/Users/ahsanmansoor/ECE493Group19/specs/011-store-banking-information/spec.md](/Users/ahsanmansoor/ECE493Group19/specs/011-store-banking-information/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are required banking detail fields fully specified for add-bank flow inputs? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK002 Are acceptance requirements defined for all failure outcomes (validation failure, network rejection, cancel)? [Coverage, Spec §FR-005/FR-008/FR-009]
- [ ] CHK003 Are duplicate bank-account handling requirements explicitly documented? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications]
- [ ] CHK004 Is post-save visibility of masked account information explicitly defined? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 Are terms like "securely" and "available for fee payments" translated into objective acceptance statements? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006/FR-007]
- [ ] CHK006 Are validation failure messages required to be actionable and field-specific rather than generic? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK007 Are cancellation requirements explicit that no partial or draft records may persist? [Clarity, Spec §FR-008/FR-009]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK008 Do all user stories remain consistent with UC-11 main flow and extensions 3a/4a? [Consistency, Spec §User Stories]
- [ ] CHK009 Are key entities and their states consistent with functional requirements and edge cases? [Consistency, Spec §Key Entities/Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK010 Is terminology consistent for bank account, payment method, and banking details across all sections? [Consistency, Spec §Global]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK011 Are all success criteria measurable and directly tied to user-observable outcomes? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001..SC-004]
- [ ] CHK012 Can each functional requirement be validated by at least one acceptance scenario or test statement? [Traceability, Spec §FR + User Scenarios]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK013 Are banking-network dependency assumptions explicitly stated and failure behavior documented? [Dependency, Spec §Edge Cases/Clarifications]
- [ ] CHK014 Are protected-artifact and constitution constraints captured without introducing conflicts? [Consistency, Spec §FR-010..FR-013]

## Notes

- Depth selected: Standard (recommended default).
- Audience/timing selected: PR reviewer quality gate (recommended default).
- Focus areas selected: Requirement clarity and edge/failure coverage.
